articles.title: ‘Senior assassin’ game in Stoneham leads police to briefly detain high schooler
articles.description:
The teenager is heard on the body camera footage explaining he was holding a "senior assassin water gun" and apologizing to the officer.

The post ‘Senior assassin’ game in Stoneham leads police to briefly detain high schooler appeared first on Boston.com.
